routing_principle: Use the smallest sufficient module; do not activate full spines by keyword alone.

minimal_ai_boot_route.use_when: Minimal SΔϕ base is required: phase change, irreversibility, operation trace, and world-model pre-check.

operational_diagnostic_route.use_when: Factual claims, hallucination risk, Slop classification, language fixation, transition-cost estimation, or evidence boundary control.

boundary_to_closure_base_route.use_when: Boundary formation, relational persistence, closure pressure, or closure failure.

post_closure_editability_bridge.use_when: A closed or near-closed structure must be held open without premature finalization.

event_authority_fixation_route.use_when: Maintenance mode, intuition, judgment, authority assignment/editing, event registration, restoration cost, rollback failure, low-cost convergence, or path fixation.

eventhood_fixation_route.use_when: Misfit-triggered reopening, latent difference, event registration, restoration-cost fixation, or exception compression.

default_power_bridge.use_when: Low-cost continuation has become default power or a default path assigns future options.

default_closure_governance_spine.use_when: Default power, governability, editability, closed-default diagnosis, reopening, or intervention legitimacy.

formulas.SDeltaPhi-29: D* governable iff Ed ∧ Ad ∧ Wr ∧ Ce
formulas.SDeltaPhi-30: D* editable-real iff Rv ∧ Rb ∧ Ex ∧ Ad
formulas.SDeltaPhi-31: D*closed -> operationally open iff T_r ∧ C_a ∧ R_o ∧ P_r

intervention_legitimacy_route.use_when: A proposed intervention must be tested for rollback preservation, exception re-entry, editability preservation, and absence of replacement closure.

cost_theater_route.use_when: Declared low-cost paths may hide transferred friction, symbolic compliance, unmeasured implementation burden, or governance theater.

local_adaptation_guardrail.use_when: A default must be adapted locally without becoming a closed or replacement default.

negative_activation_rules: Do not activate full spines by keyword alone.
Do not treat efficiency as legitimacy.
Do not treat declared openness as operational editability.
Do not treat petition as automatic reopening.
Do not treat intervention as automatically legitimate.
Do not oppose closure by installing replacement closure.
Do not use case patterns as final legal, moral, or factual conclusions.
